arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford’s Man United journey nearing ‘inevitable ending’ – Gary Neville
arts.sum: Rashford was left out of the matchday squad for the third straight game on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford has become a 'distraction' and needs to leave Manchester United in January, believes Gary Neville... as he backs Ruben Amorim over handling of axed striker
arts.sum: Gary Neville has claimed that Marcus Rashford needs to leave Manchester United in January and labelled him a 'distraction'. Rashford has been frozen out under Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: 'I could see' - Ruben Amorim gives exciting answer about his Manchester United rebuild
arts.sum: Man Utd play Bournemouth in the Premier League on Sunday and Ruben Amorim spoke ahead of the game.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains Marcus Rashford's extended Man Utd exile against Bournemouth
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford was left out of Man Utd's squad for a third consecutive match on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Manchester United-linked Nuno Mendes 'weighs up PSG future' amid uncertain contract situation
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly receive a boost in their bid to reunite Paris Saint-Germain defender Nuno Mendes with his former Sporting Lisbon boss Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Team News: Marcus Rashford, Alejandro Garnacho decisions made as Ruben Amorim names Man United XI vs. Bournemouth
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim names his starting side for Sunday's Premier League clash with Bournemouth at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Scott McTominay takes another Man Utd star to Napoli
arts.sum: Maguire's future at Man Utd has been very much in doubt as his contract expires at the end of the season, and he fell down the centre back pecking order under former manager Ten Hag. According to The Athletic, Napoli are considering making a move for Harry Maguire in 2025 as they have been buoyed by the success of his former Man Utd teammate McTominay.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim told the four Man Utd players to build around including new captain
arts.sum: Teddy Sheringham has named four Manchester United players that Ruben Amorim should build his new team around.

arts.ttl: Man United could complete sensational Marcus Rashford swap to correct summer transfer mistake
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford continues to be linked with a move away from Manchester United ahead of the transfer window

arts.ttl: Man Utd plot post-season trip to comply with Premier League financial regulations
arts.sum: Man Utd are currently planning a financially rewarding post-season friendly tour in Malaysia.
